_meta.description: Climate section registered input nodes. These are user-editable values that drive all climate calculations in the computation graph. Province and city select the climate data source. Timeframe toggles present vs future climate projections. Capacitance settings affect ground-facing CDD calculation. Cooling days sets the cooling season length. Cooling setpoint override allows raising the cooling setpoint above 24°C. CDD user override allows manual entry of cooling degree days when the climate database returns 'Unavailable' (sentinel value 666).

instances.label: Thermal Capacitance Setting
instances.note: Controls ground-facing CDD calculation method: 'Static' floors GF-CDD at zero, 'Capacitance' allows negative values

instances.label: Capacitance Percentage
instances.note: Used as capacitance factor (i_21/100) with fallback to 0.5 in ground-facing heat gain calculations

instances.label: Cooling Season Days
instances.note: Number of days in the cooling season; heating days = 365 - coolingDays

instances.label: Cooling Setpoint Override
instances.note: User can raise cooling setpoint above 24°C; values ≤24 are floored to 24 in climate.cooling.setpoint

instances.label: CDD User Override
instances.note: Manual CDD entry for cities where climate database returns 'Unavailable' (sentinel 666). When non-null and > 0, takes priority over climate data lookup in climate.cooling.degreedays (d_21).

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput)
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by downstream computation nodes

preconditions.condition: province is a valid Canadian province code
preconditions.description: Must match keys in ClimateValues.js (ON, BC, AB, etc.)

preconditions.condition: city exists in the selected province's climate data
preconditions.description: City must be in ClimateData[province] lookup

invariants.description: Only two valid timeframes for climate data selection
Cooling season cannot exceed total year

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of all climate lookup nodes (HDD, CDD, temperatures, elevation)
behavior.note: G-classified inputs affect all models when changed

behavior.condition: Timeframe changes between Present and Future
behavior.output: HDD and CDD switch between present and future climate projection keys
behavior.note: Affects HDD18 vs HDD18_2021_2050, CDD24 vs CDD24_2021_2050

behavior.condition: CDD user override set to a positive number
behavior.output: climate.cooling.degreedays returns the override value instead of climate data lookup
behavior.note: Overrides the 'Unavailable' sentinel for cities without CDD data

behavior.condition: CDD user override is null, empty, or non-positive
behavior.output: climate.cooling.degreedays falls back to climate data lookup
behavior.note: Default behavior when no manual override is provided

behavior.output: Ground-facing CDD calculation uses MAX(0, ...) to floor at zero
behavior.note: Static mode prevents negative ground-facing CDD

behavior.output: Ground-facing CDD can be negative (representing ground heat sink effect)
behavior.note: More physically accurate model allowing ground to absorb heat

edgeCases.condition: City not found in climate database
edgeCases.handling: getClimateData returns null; downstream nodes use their respective defaults
edgeCases.rationale: Graceful fallback when location data unavailable

edgeCases.condition: CDD user override clears to empty after being set
edgeCases.handling: Reverts to climate data lookup (null/empty treated as unset)

tests.name: CDD override takes priority over lookup
CDD override null falls back to lookup
